name: developing-open-source-aerospace-hardware-like-oss
description: Developing Open-Source Aerospace Hardware like OSS

scripts.buildUnifiedModel: yq eval-all '. as $item ireduce ({}; . * $item)' build/package.yaml build/model.yaml > build/unifiedModel.yaml
scripts.buildPresentationView: cp -r images/ build/ && cp -r node_modules/ build/ && asciidoctor-revealjs build/presentation.adoc -D build/
scripts.build: npm run clean && npm run createBuildDir && npm run buildPackageYaml && npm run buildModel && npm run buildUnifiedModel && npm run buildPresentationAdoc && npm run buildPresentationView

author: Sean Marquez
